steps.title: Use the range of examples
steps.content: The passage says Chicago has everything from monumental sculpture, such as Cloud Gate, to innovative street art, such as High Tide. Those examples cover very different kinds of public art, so the blank needs a phrase about variety or range.

steps.title: Reject negative abstractions
steps.content: Choice A introduces controversy, Choice C means indifference, and Choice D means uncertainty. None of those ideas explains why the city's public art can satisfy any art lover. A phrase meaning wide range fits the examples because many kinds of art would appeal to many tastes. The answer is B.
